case_opening: The Auren family heirloom has gone missing from the estate. It was last seen in Victor Auren’s study, where it was believed to be secure, yet it has now been discovered gone. With no signs of forced entry and limited access to the room, the situation raises more questions than answers. Was the heirloom deliberately stolen, accidentally damaged and hidden, or simply misplaced within the estate?
what_choice_2: The heirloom was damaged... and someone tried to hide it.
what_choice_3: The heirloom wasn’t stolen... it was lost, and someone lied to cover it up.

case_opening: A formal dinner at the Auren estate goes wrong when one of the guests, Elliot Kessler, collapses before the evening is over. The guests and staff all give different accounts of what happened, and the carefully planned night quickly turns into an investigation. Was this a deliberate attack, a terrible accident, or was someone else meant to be the real target?
what_choice_1: This wasn’t random... the victim was poisoned.
what_choice_2: It was a mistake… but someone tried to cover it up.
what_choice_3: This victim wasn’t the target... they were a mistake.

case_opening: Finleigh Auren, the only daughter of Victor Auren and Claire Delmare and heir to their combined wealth, is missing from the estate. Her room is empty, her schedule was interrupted, and no one can agree on when she was last seen. In a house where every movement is usually watched, her disappearance raises more questions than answers. Was she taken, harmed, or did she leave with help from someone inside?
what_choice_1: Finleigh didn’t leave on her own... she was taken.
what_choice_2: Finleigh is dead... and someone here is hiding it.
what_choice_3: Finleigh chose to leave... but she didn’t do it alone.
